arrival.say: Atmosphere: damp. Morale, by the look of the vines: damper.
Someone here is very worried... and very, very embarrassed.

look.text: A ring of scorched grass where the beam sets you down. The Hollow mows around it.

use.text: Gold static, and — faintly — the smell of nettle tea.
The Marigold crackles down: "Finish the job first, Ensign."

look.text: The relay hums a contented fifth. Mist drifts toward the greenhouse like an apology.
The coil head is dark. The empty crystal socket stares back; the tuning collar sits a whole tone low.
The colony's weather relay: a mast, a coil head, and no light in it anywhere. It hums, very faintly, wrong.

use.text: Leave it be. It's happy now.
Prodding it does nothing. The hum stays faint, and stays wrong.

itemUse.text: The sniffer chirps twice: focusing crystal — burnt out. Calibration — off by exactly a whole tone. Exactly. That's no storm.
The sniffer chirps approvingly. Nothing new to disapprove of.
The crystal seats in the socket with a click like a struck glass.
You strike the fork on your boot and hold it to the coil. The relay shivers, finds the note, and the mist-heads hiss awake all down the vine rows.
The fork rings true; the relay can't answer. The burnt crystal won't hold a note.

look.text: Just a crack in the rock now. Nothing glitters.
A crack in the basalt. Deep down, something glitters — glassy, regular, man-made.

use.text: Cog kneels, reaches in to the shoulder, and returns holding a spare crystal like a teacup. "Undamaged. Unlike its predecessor."
Too narrow and too deep for your arm. Cog's, on the other hand, does not complain about basalt.
Survey regulations are silent on blind spelunking. Your fingers are not.
Empty now, and welcome to stay that way.

look.text: Mist rolls down the glass in slow, satisfied curtains. The vines uncurl, ostentatiously.
Long glass houses, mist-heads hanging dry over the vine rows. The vines have begun, resentfully, to curl.

use.text: The door's for colonists. The problem's outside anyway — up the mast.

look.text: Wren, the Hollow's botanist. Soil on her knees, worry all over her face.

talk.speaker: target
talk.text: "LISTEN to it! The mists! Oh, the vines will be insufferable about this."

talk.speaker: target
talk.text: "True to A! Mostly!" she calls, hovering.

itemUse.text: The sniffer reads: flustered, seventy-eight percent. Rising.
